schoolId.description: Unique identifier in the format PPDDCCSS, where PP is province, DD is district, CC is commune, and SS is school suffix

districtCode.description: identifying the district within the province

communeCode.description: identifying the commune within the district

schoolSuffix.description: 2-digit suffix uniquely identifying the school within the commune

schoolIdConsistency.description: Ensures schoolId is correctly formed from its components
schoolIdConsistency.errMessage: Error while validating schoolID: Ensures schoolId is correctly formed from its components

provinceExists.description: Verifies provinceCode exists in the Province registry
provinceExists.errMessage: Error while validating Province: Province with the specified code does not exist in registry

districtExistsUnderProvince.description: Verifies districtCode exists under the specified province
districtExistsUnderProvince.errMessage: Error while validating District: District with the specified code does not exist under the given province

communeExistsUnderDistrict.description: Verifies communeCode exists under the specified district
communeExistsUnderDistrict.errMessage: Error while validating Commune: Commune with the specified code does not exist under the given district

schoolSuffixUniqueInCommune.description: Ensures schoolSuffix is unique within the commune
schoolSuffixUniqueInCommune.errMessage: School suffix must be unique within the specified commune
